Hero.title: Turn time into financial independence.
Hero.description:
A calm operating layer for capital, decisions, and editorial signal.
Structure first. Complexity only when it earns its place.

signal.label: Focus
signal.value: Keep the plan visible when the market gets loud.

capital.label: Capital
capital.value: Capital flows where intent is defined.

decisions.label: Decisions
decisions.value: Turn repeated judgment into a repeatable system.
